settings.product_intro: A static-safe product detail foundation that preserves the approved Mzansi Select balance of premium presentation, clear pricing, and practical support cues while live Shopify product wiring remains deferred.
settings.description_copy: Designed for everyday listening, work calls, and travel, this product detail page shell mirrors the approved storefront language with a clean gallery-first layout, compact pricing hierarchy, and straightforward support reassurance. Final catalog data and transactional behaviour remain deferred to a later approved slice.
settings.specs_copy:
Wireless Bluetooth connectivity
Up to 28 hours playback
Fold-flat travel design
Soft over-ear cushions
USB-C charging cable included
